issue_title: Fix: iPad navbar spacing and CTA and customers page
issue_body_preview:
<!--
Thank you for sending the PR! We appreciate you spending the time to work on these changes.

Help us understand your motivation by explaining why you decided to make this change.

You can learn more about contributing to appwrite here: https://github.com/appwrite/appwrite/blob/master/CONTR
test_description_zh: 在 iPad 尺寸的视口下访问首页，检查导航栏（navbar）的间距是否正常、CTA 按钮的布局是否正确；然后导航到 customers 页面，检查页面布局和元素间距是否正常显示。
expected_result_zh: 在 iPad 分辨率下，导航栏各元素间距合理，CTA 按钮正常显示且位置正确，不出现溢出或重叠；customers 页面布局完整，元素间距正常，无错位或遮挡现象。
